name: canshare-tnm-gi-colorectal-pm
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum pathological M category
description: A pathological distant metastasis stage (pM) of a gastrointestional colon and/or rectum tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
